General.Name: Artmarket.com SA
General.Description: Artmarket.com provides art market information in France. It also operates a marketplace to buy or sell artworks; and engages in auction sale of Fine Art and NFTs. The company was formerly known as Artprice.com and changed its name to Artmarket.com. Artmarket.com was incorporated in 1997 and is based in Saint-Romain-au-Mont-d'Or, France.
General.Address: Domaine de la Source, Saint-Romain-au-Mont-d'Or, France, 69270
